location.office_time_required: some in-person meetings, with flexibility to work from home

level_signals: Comp range $147,595–$210,850 base, consistent with Senior PM at a large tech company
Expected to own product vision, strategy, and roadmap independently
Expected to influence senior stakeholders across teams

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have significant experience building and scaling consumer-facing digital products used by large audiences
You have a strong track record of owning product strategy, vision, and roadmaps for complex consumer products
You have successfully led products from concept through launch, delivering meaningful customer and business outcomes
Skilled at distilling complex problems into simple, intuitive experiences

You have experience building AI-powered, conversational, search, recommendation, discovery, or personalization experiences and understand how to translate emerging technologies into meaningful customer value
An excellent communicator, able to align stakeholders and influence decisions
Comfortable using data and experimentation to inform decisions
You have strong product judgment and are comfortable making strategic decisions and trade-offs in ambiguous environments
You bring a clear point of view on product strategy and can connect day-to-day product decisions to long-term customer and business outcomes
You care deeply about creating exceptional consumer experiences and have a passion for understanding what drives user engagement, satisfaction, and loyalty

scope.surface: Core Experience — conversational and AI-powered experiences for Spotify listeners across devices, apps, and platforms
scope.business_model: B2C consumer subscription / freemium audio streaming
core_responsibilities: Define and drive product vision and strategy for conversational and AI-powered experiences that serve millions of Spotify listeners globally
Own and prioritize a long-term roadmap, making strategic trade-offs that balance customer needs, business impact, and technical opportunities
Identify customer needs, market opportunities, and emerging consumer behaviors to shape future product direction
Define intuitive user experiences that combine direct responses with seamless navigation across the app
Partner with engineering, design, and AI teams to deliver high-quality, scalable solutions
Use data, insights, and experimentation to inform decisions and improve user experience
Work in a cross-functional team to bring ideas from concept to launch
Shape product direction and influence decisions across teams and senior stakeholders to deliver meaningful outcomes for millions of Spotify listeners
Help drive alignment across the broader Spotify experience, ensuring consistency, quality, and impact across multiple user journeys and surfaces

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed ($147,595–$210,850 base) plus equity
Generous benefits: six months paid parental leave, 23 paid days off, monthly meal allowance
Hybrid flexibility explicitly offered — 'work where you work best'
Clear product surface and ownership area (conversational/AI experiences for Spotify listeners)
Role is at a globally recognized consumer tech brand with massive user scale
Explicit equal opportunity and inclusivity commitments
red_flags: No years-of-experience minimum stated, making seniority expectations ambiguous
Role is New York-based only; no remote option indicated for US candidates outside NY
Visa sponsorship status not mentioned anywhere in the JD
No mention of team size or reporting structure

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title 'Senior PM' and comp range)
scope.business_model (inferred from Spotify's well-known B2C freemium audio streaming model)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not stated in JD)
ambiguities: No explicit years-of-experience number is given; 'significant experience' is the only qualifier — seniority is inferred from title and compensation.
Hybrid policy is described as 'some in-person meetings' with 'flexibility to work from home' but no percentage or day-count is specified.
Visa sponsorship is entirely unaddressed in the JD.
